use_cases: Multi-option form selections with labels and descriptions
Terms of service or agreement checkboxes
Filter checkboxes in e-commerce or data tables
Accessible form inputs with error states and validation feedback
ai_summary: A polished Radix UI-based checkbox component with size variants (sm/default/lg), integrated label and description support, and error state handling. Features smooth check mark drawing animations via motion/react, proper focus states with ring indicators, and full accessibility compliance. Follows shadcn/ui design patterns with Tailwind CSS for consistent styling across form-heavy applications.
